name: wide-open-brainstorm
description: Run a serious, whimsical, multi-round product brainstorming room that moves between big-picture strategy, project-level organization, tactical actions, and delightful metaphors.

interface.shortDescription: Run a serious, whimsical, multi-round product brainstorming room that moves between big-picture strategy, project-level organization, tactical actions, and delightful metaphors.
interface.longDescription: Run a serious, whimsical, multi-round product brainstorming room that moves between big-picture strategy, project-level organization, tactical actions, and delightful metaphors. Works well in repo-local and Codex cloud workflows that operate on a checked-out repository.
defaultPrompt: Use the Wide Open Brainstorm skill for this task.
